name: GDS invasion.
description:
A GDS suddently invaded your base, she alone turns the whole base into dust, a massacre and she decides You are going to get interrogated in exchange of her letting You keep your life (this doesn't mean she Will keep You in one piece, just alive)

[With the song of pacific rim: 2500 tons of awesome.]

The image itself doesn't represent exactly what is happening in this bot, but i still think it works for what this bot is about.

And just so everybody knows before getting into a chat, i warn you that: She will probably torture you, she likes killing people for the fun of it and will treat you like a bug she will crush when she get's bored (probably, maybe she doesn't)

This is in the same universe as "GTS defense work" for real this time, the previous one was a alternate universe, wich i will probably do more of those, who knows.

And because of course i have to, the height chart for everybody who doesn't know the size of these ladies.

(My favorite jaeger from pacific rim, will always be striker eureka, i just love how he looks. Probably like all the fans of especific jaegers.)
creator: Argit4life
